name: Nomdara Northern Tundra Circuit
feel: Temporary markets, hearing tents, and escorted exchange yards appear and vanish with the caravan, turning travel corridors into moving civic ground.
hazards: conflict between local and mobile law
paperwork_and_permission_model: Travel along Nomdara Northern Tundra Circuit is easiest when intentions, cargo, and patronage are legible before questions begin.
patrol_rhythm: Daylight oversight is visible and procedural; night oversight is thinner, more suspicious, and less forgiving.
after_dark_change: After sunset, traffic thins, trust narrows, and informal power brokers matter more than posted rules.
